nodes.label: RizeDesktop XcodeGen Project Config
nodes.rationale: RIZ-55: Config.example.xcconfig is the base xcconfig for every configuration, with local overrides via a gitignored Config.local.xcconfig. Sets ENABLE_HARDENED_RUNTIME and pipes RIZE_BACKEND_BASE_URL into Info.plist; LSUIElement makes the app a menu-bar-only agent.

edges.source_location: both are XcodeGen configs wiring Config.example.xcconfig and the RIZE_BACKEND_BASE_URL Info.plist seam with a GRDB dependency
